$namespace.description: Optional namespace override. If omitted, the namespace is derived from the `.vocab` directory path.

tags.description: Tags applied to all keys in this file (e.g. for Phrase).

message.description: ICU MessageFormat string for this key in this file’s language.

globalKey.description: Stable key for external translation tools (e.g. Phrase).

tags.description: Tags for this key (dev file only when loading with tags).

description: Dev language file (`translations.json`). Top-level keys (other than `$namespace` and `_meta`) are translation IDs. Each value must include `message` (ICU MessageFormat). Optional per-key: `description`, `globalKey`, `tags`. File-level `_meta.tags` applies when using tooling that reads tags.
title: Vocab dev translation file
